description: Canonical schema for TrailGenic permits intelligence dataset records.

fields.name: permit_id
fields.description: TrailGenic canonical permit identifier in the format rec_gov_<facility_id>_<type>.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the permit.

fields.name: rec_gov_facility_id
fields.description: Recreation.gov facility identifier used for booking and availability.

fields.name: permit_type
fields.description: Permit category used for route logic.

fields.name: location
fields.description: Geographic and elevation metadata for the permit area.

fields.name: location.park
fields.description: Park, forest, or wilderness unit associated with the permit.

fields.name: location.state
fields.description: Two-letter US state code for the primary permit area.

fields.name: location.lat
fields.description: Representative latitude for the permit objective.

fields.name: location.lon
fields.description: Representative longitude for the permit objective.

fields.name: location.elevation_summit_ft
fields.description: Maximum route or objective elevation in feet.

fields.name: location.elevation_trailhead_ft
fields.description: Typical starting trailhead elevation in feet.

fields.name: scarcity_tier
fields.description: Top-level permit scarcity tier.

fields.name: quota_daily
fields.description: Total daily permit quota for the represented permit type.

fields.name: group_size_max
fields.description: Maximum group size allowed by permit policy.

fields.name: release_calendar
fields.description: Primary recurring release and season timing fields.

fields.name: release_calendar.lottery_open
fields.description: Lottery opening date in MM-DD format.

fields.name: release_calendar.lottery_close
fields.description: Lottery close date in MM-DD format.

fields.name: release_calendar.lottery_results
fields.description: Lottery result publication date in MM-DD format.

fields.name: release_calendar.claim_deadline
fields.description: Lottery claim deadline date in MM-DD format.

fields.name: release_calendar.walkup_opens
fields.description: Date when rolling or walk-up inventory opens in MM-DD format.

fields.name: release_calendar.season_start
fields.description: Typical permit season start in MM-DD format.

fields.name: release_calendar.season_end
fields.description: Typical permit season end in MM-DD format.

fields.name: rules
fields.description: Operational rules and policy constraints attached to the permit.

fields.name: rules.bear_canister_required
fields.description: Whether approved bear canisters are required for permit compliance.

fields.name: rules.wag_bag_required
fields.description: Whether waste-pack-out wag bags are required.

fields.name: rules.consecutive_permits_allowed
fields.description: Whether consecutive day bookings are generally allowed.

fields.name: rules.fee_per_person_usd
fields.description: Per-person permit fee in US dollars.

fields.name: rules.no_show_deadline_hours
fields.description: Hours before entry when no-show inventory is typically released or canceled.

fields.name: rules.self_issue_available
fields.description: Whether permits can be self-issued without reservation.

fields.name: scarcity
fields.description: Scarcity telemetry for automation and monitoring priority.

fields.name: scarcity.tier
fields.description: Normalized scarcity tier.

fields.name: scarcity.scarcity_score
fields.description: Composite scarcity score (0-100).

fields.name: scarcity.lottery_odds_pct
fields.description: Estimated lottery success probability percentage.

fields.name: scarcity.avg_sellout_minutes_post_release
fields.description: Average minutes until sellout following general release.

fields.name: scarcity.historical_cancellation_rate_pct
fields.description: Estimated cancellation availability rate percentage.

fields.name: scarcity.best_days_to_monitor
fields.description: Days of week with highest observed cancellation turnover.

fields.name: scarcity.peak_dates
fields.description: High-demand seasonal dates in MM-DD format.

fields.name: trailgenic
fields.description: TrailGenic physiological and operational interpretation layer.

fields.name: trailgenic.physiological_demand
fields.description: Aggregate demand class for preparedness modeling.

fields.name: trailgenic.elevation_gain_ft
fields.description: Approximate total elevation gain in feet for the canonical route.

fields.name: trailgenic.round_trip_miles
fields.description: Approximate round-trip mileage for the canonical route.

fields.name: trailgenic.altitude_exposure
fields.description: Altitude exposure risk band used in pre-trip planning.

fields.name: trailgenic.fasted_compatible
fields.description: Whether the objective is generally compatible with fasted execution.

fields.name: trailgenic.recommended_acclimation_days
fields.description: Recommended acclimation days before attempt.

fields.name: trailgenic.longevity_risk_factors
fields.description: Primary risk factors relevant to longevity-oriented planning.

fields.name: agent_actions
fields.description: Agent automation capabilities and action endpoints.

fields.name: agent_actions.can_query_availability
fields.description: Whether the platform can query live availability for this permit.

fields.name: agent_actions.can_subscribe_webhook
fields.description: Whether users can subscribe to webhook notifications for availability changes.

fields.name: agent_actions.can_transact
fields.description: Whether direct booking transactions are supported by the agent.

fields.name: agent_actions.availability_endpoint
fields.description: TrailGenic endpoint for permit availability checks.

fields.name: agent_actions.subscribe_endpoint
fields.description: TrailGenic endpoint for availability subscription.

fields.name: agent_actions.booking_url
fields.description: Canonical external booking URL on Recreation.gov.
